# The InjectR

> Nurse-led medical aesthetics in Etobicoke, serving the Greater Toronto Area, including in-home visits. Run by Randa Tighe, a Registered Practical Nurse (RPN), under physician medical direction. Conservative, natural-looking results. Consultations are free.

## What we do

Injectable and regenerative medical aesthetics, delivered conservatively for natural results. Treatments include wrinkle-relaxing injections, dermal fillers, biostimulators, skin boosters, PRP for skin and hair, microneedling, and skin and body wellness treatments. Every client is assessed and treated by the same nurse, from the first consultation to the final result, under physician medical direction.

## Who we work with

People across the GTA who want natural, understated results from a regulated nurse rather than an overdone look. Women and men, first-time and experienced.

## How to engage

Book a free consultation. Based in Etobicoke and available across the GTA, with in-home visits offered as a premium option.

## Contact

- Website: https://theinjectr.com
- Practitioner: Randa Tighe, RPN (College of Nurses of Ontario)
- Location: Etobicoke and the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada
